The '''Orange Panthacs''' were a privately-owned [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] used during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] with the intention of slowing down the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s frequent occupation of planets. On the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Mantessa]], the droids were able to [[Battle of Mantessa|fight off]] a force of [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Fire Breather]]s. [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] later awarded the Orange Panthacs a special commendation.<ref name="NEGD" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Orange Panthacs were first mentioned in the reference book ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'', written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and released in [[2006]].<ref name="NEGD" />
